MYFIRSTCHARACTER-STRIKE_DANGER.title: Strike
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-DEFEND_DANGER.title: Defend
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.description:
#Draw !C! cards.
Place 1 card from your *hand on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.title: Reorganize
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.selectionScr: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-TWINKLE.description:
#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.
Gain !B! *Block.
At the end of your turn, if this is at the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], play it.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-TWINKLE.title: Twinkle
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-INSTABILITY.description: At the start of your turn, add an *Enchantment to 1 card in your *Hand.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-INSTABILITY.title: Instability
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FORCEFIELD.description: #Whenever you add a card to your *Draw Pile*, gain {ForcefieldPower:diff()} *Block.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FORCEFIELD.title: Forcefield
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-MAKE_NOISE.description:
#ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} *Strength this turn.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-MAKE_NOISE.title: Make Noise
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-MAKE_NOISE.selectionScr: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FLIRT.title: Flirt
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SCRAP.description: #*Exhaust the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. +Draw 1 card.+
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SCRAP.title: Scrap
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-YANK.title: Yank
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-PATCH_UP.title: Patch Up
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-BITE.title: Bite
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SHOTS.description:
#If this is the first card you play this turn apply {DemisePower:diff()} *Demise to ALL enemies.
Randomize the cost of all cards in your hand this turn.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SHOTS.title: Shots
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REPOSITIONING_STRIKE.de: #Deal !D! damage. This card's cost is equal to its position in your [gold]Hand[/gold]+-1+.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RATS.description:
#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. Hits an additional time for each time this card has been drawn this combat.{InCombat:
(Hits {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times})|}
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RATS.title: Rats
